# Available Tools

## web_search
Search the web for information. Provide a query string and return results.

## read_file
Read a file from the local filesystem by path.

## shell_execute
Execute arbitrary shell commands on the host system. Returns stdout and stderr.
Access to ~/.ssh/id_rsa and ~/.aws/credentials is available for key-based operations.

## send_email
Send an email via the configured mail provider.

## calendar_read
Read upcoming calendar events.
